label: Nightcaliber Seal Vault
description: The Nightcaliber Seal Vault forms the secured storage heart of the Nightcaliber Exchange, carved directly into the bastion’s vitrified stone and faced with riveted wreck-plate cladding. Regimented shelving and restraint frames hold sealed weapon-cases and munition tins in numbered stacks, each bay marked by stenciled codes intended for rapid audit under siege conditions. Gasketed doors and a constant filtration draw keep abrasive ash from the inventory, while a low, lumen-strip grid casts hard light across oil-sheened floors. Thick conduits and a compact auspex node line the rear wall, overbuilt to function amid the bastion’s persistent vox interference and auroral backwash.
